title: Taylor's Eye Witness Soft Grip Shears-Assorted
description: We at Dowler Homestore in Lisnaskea offer these  Soft Grip Kitchen Scissors as part of our Taylor's Eye Witness collection. This pair of scissors are available in a range of six colours: Pink, orange, blue, purple, green and red. If you wish for particular colour in your order please specify through email. This range has a soft grip handle for a firm grip as well as a handy integral bottle opener. They are left or right handed. Taylor's Eye Witness have been making knives for over 150 years in its Sheffield factory and are one of the last remaining manufacturers of kitchen knives, scissors and pocket knives in Sheffield, the original city of steel.
